established_patterns.options_struct_model: CompileConfig in pkg/cli/compile_pipeline.go is the refactor model
established_patterns.pkg_constants_grouping: pkg/constants/constants.go is canonical for Default* constants. FilePerm/DirPerm/DefaultHTTPClientTimeout all landed here.
established_patterns.helper_underadoption_failure_mode: Persistent thread across Runs 5/7/8/9/10/11/12: helper exists but call sites bypass via literal duplication OR different-shape construction (filepath.Join split-segments, identical struct definitions in two packages). Re-audit cadence ~7 days catches most adoption rollouts.
established_patterns.context_propagation_pattern: Correct at actionpins.go:317: cmp.Or(ctx.Ctx, context.Background()). context.Background() ONLY at top-level boundaries.
established_patterns.non_context_convenience_wrapper: github_cli.go RunGH/RunGHContext: short-name wrapper creates Background and calls Context variant. Defensible.
established_patterns.init_function_criteria: Acceptable: analyzer flag registration, wasm build-tag overrides, embedded JSON load, map derivation from package-level data. NOT acceptable: log-only stub bodies whose comments admit work was removed.
established_patterns.mutex_unlock_idiom: defer mu.Unlock() is dominant (~70%). Manual Unlock fragile to future early-return additions. Closure-wrapped defer works even when defer would extend critical section unwantedly.
established_patterns.cache_state_struct_consolidation: Run 12: two packages with identical singleflight-cache struct (mu+result+err+done) should share generic helper (syncutil.OnceLoader[T]).

bash_policy_limits: Workspace shell blocks multi-statement scripts and awk on /dev/null. mkdir/ls outside /home/runner/work/gh-aw/gh-aw blocked. gh CLI returns 403 on /meta - no duplicate detection. Use Write tool over heredoc append. Compound 'mkdir && ls' is split-checked - issue separate calls.
